issues.message: Component included in data but NOT exported from components/index.ts. DefaultVideo is an internal component (used inside Media/Video), not part of the public API. Should be removed from data file.

Component name field says 'ReactPlayerBlock' but the public export name is 'ReactPlayer' (from components/index.ts line 34). The import_statement correctly uses ReactPlayer but the name field is wrong.
Component included in data but NOT exported from components/index.ts. MediaBase is an internal layout component used by block-level sub-blocks. Should be removed from data file.
Hook exported from hooks/index.ts (via hubspot.ts) but missing from data file hooks array. Signature: useLoopBackHubspotEvents(formId: string): void
Hook exported from hooks/index.ts (via hubspot.ts) but missing from data file hooks array. Signature: useHandleHubspotEvents(handlers: HubspotEventHandlers, formId: string): void

Data file missing several props from MediaAllProps: 'disableImageSliderForArrayInput' (boolean), 'playVideo' (boolean, default true), 'isBackground' (boolean), 'playButton' (PlayButtonProps), 'customBarControlsClassName' (string), 'margins' (boolean), 'videoMicrodata' (object with name/description/duration/uploadDate/contentUrl/thumbnailUrl), 'isFullscreenImageCover' (boolean).

Data file missing 'autoplay' prop (boolean) which is destructured and used in source. Also missing 'elapsedTime' and 'customControlsOptions' props inherited from MediaVideoProps via Omit<MediaVideoProps, 'src'|'ref'>.
Data file marks 'children' as required:true but source destructures with default: 'children = []'. Should be required:false with default '[]'.
Data file lists size type including 'ns' and 'n' values. The source uses OldButtonSize type mapped via toCommonSize - verify 'ns' is a real size value and not a typo.

Data file missing props inherited from MediaProps via BackgroundMediaProps: 'image' (ImageProps), 'youtube' (string), 'videoIframe' (string), 'dataLens' (string), 'iframe' (string), 'height' (number), 'previewImg' (string). These are passed through via ...props spread to Media component.

Data file lists only 'src', 'desktop', 'className', 'imageClassName', 'style', 'qa', 'children' but BackgroundImageProps likely inherits additional image props (tablet, mobile, alt, etc.) that are spread into Image component.
MapProps is actually a union of YMapProps and GMapProps with different prop sets. Data file presents a flat simplified view that doesn't distinguish between the two map provider types.
Description says 'Class component' but this should be verified - modern page-constructor may use function components.
Description says 'Class component' - needs verification against actual source implementation style.
Description says 'Class component' - needs verification. Default arrowSize=18 should be confirmed against source.
